name: wolfgang-indian-property-drafting
display_name: wolfgang_rush — Indian Property & Conveyancing Drafting · Claude Desktop Extension
description: Drafting connector for Indian Civil Courts (property suits, partition, declaration, possession). STRICT SIX-AGENT PIPELINE: Reader → Format → Drafter → Verifier → Refiner → Overseer, producing six named artifacts (case-facts.md, format-shell.md, draft-v1.docx, verification-report.md, draft-v2.docx, final-draft.docx). MANDATORY INVOCATION ORDER: (1) call get_agent_instructions() with NO arguments FIRST to receive the full orchestration script, (2) follow every step in that script in order, (3) save every intermediate artifact via save_artifact, (4) save final-draft.docx via save_draft_as_docx. DO NOT write standalone python-docx or JavaScript scripts to generate output — invoke the pipeline tools directly. DO NOT skip the Verifier (anti-hallucination firewall) or the Overseer (opposing-counsel lens). Reader applies the privacy firewall — party names, addresses, identifying numbers, financial figures substituted with structural placeholders before any downstream agent processes the facts. Zero data leaves the user's machine.
long_description: Sale, gift, mortgage, lease, partition, settlement, exchange, release, wakf, private-trust deeds + title-investigation reports. Stamp + Registration + Suraj Lamp compliance. 8 State exemplars. Local-execution. Zero data collection. MIT-licensed.

tools.name: list_case_types
tools.description: List all property case types this connector can draft.

tools.name: get_case_type_format
tools.description: Get the drafting format for a property case type.

tools.name: get_agent_instructions
tools.description: MANDATORY FIRST CALL with no arguments — returns the full orchestration script with every step and tool call enumerated. Optional agent_name argument returns that single agent's persona instructions.

tools.name: get_pleading_base
tools.description: Get the shared property drafting base structure.

tools.name: read_case_folder
tools.description: Read files in a case folder for fact extraction.

tools.name: create_case_folder
tools.description: Create the case folder for this drafting session on the user's machine under ~/Downloads/Wolfgang-Rush-Drafts/. Returns the folder path with an inputs/ subfolder.

tools.name: save_artifact
tools.description: Save a pipeline artifact (case-facts.md, format-shell.md, draft-v1.md, verification-report.md, draft-v2.md, opposing-notes.md, or any input document) into the case folder. Required at the end of every agent step.
